books.title: The Wings of the Dove
books.author: Henry James
books.summary: A young, dying heiress draws people together amid a backdrop of Venetian elegance.

books.title: Ashenden
books.author: W. Somerset Maugham
books.summary: A collection of short stories based on the experiences of an intelligence agent during World War I.

books.title: Narrative of the Life of Frederick Douglass
books.author: Frederick Douglass
books.summary: Frederick Douglass describes his youth as a slave in Maryland and his desire to be a free man.

books.title: Eminent Victorians
books.author: Lytton Strachey
books.summary: Four witty and biting biographies of Victorians that take aim at the moral superiority of their subject’s time.

books.title: Alice’s Adventures in Wonderland
books.author: Lewis Carroll
books.summary: A young girl follows a white rabbit into a strange land of poetry, humor, and whimsy.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: P. G. Wodehouse
books.summary: A collection of P. G. Wodehouse’s short fiction.

books.title: The Alchemist
books.author: Ben Jonson
books.summary: A rollicking Elizabethan comedy in which two con men and their female compatriot gull a series of unfortunate victims out of their money.

books.title: The Surprising Adventures of Baron Munchausen
books.author: Rudolph Erich Raspe
books.summary: The legendary Baron Munchausen’s tall tales of wonder and adventure.

books.title: Gil Blas
books.author: Alain-René Lesage
books.summary: A poor youth encounters picaresque adventures as he travels through 17th century Spain.

books.title: The Turn of the Screw
books.author: Henry James
books.summary: A governess moves in to a haunted manor.

books.title: The Life of Buffalo Bill
books.author: William F. Cody
books.summary: The 1879 autobiography of William F. Cody, more commonly known as Buffalo Bill, detailing his early life in the American West.

books.title: The Unpleasantness at the Bellona Club
books.author: Dorothy L. Sayers
books.summary: The discovery of the quiet death of an elderly man at an exclusive club leads to unexpected complications.

books.title: On the Art of Writing
books.author: Arthur Quiller-Couch
books.summary: Quiller-Couch surveys the history of English prose while dispensing advice for writing tastefully.

books.title: What Is Property?
books.author: Pierre-Joseph Proudhon
books.summary: Proudhon outlines the anarchist economic theory of mutualism.

books.title: Don Juan
books.author: Lord Byron
books.summary: A Spanish libertine becomes an unwitting seducer through a series of adventurous escapades.

books.title: The Surprising Adventures of Baron Munchausen
books.author: Rudolph Erich Raspe
books.summary: The legendary Baron Munchausen’s tall tales of wonder and adventure.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: H. Beam Piper
books.summary: A collection of science fiction stories by H. Beam Piper ordered by date of publication.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: Poul Anderson
books.summary: A collection of science fiction short stories by Poul Anderson ordered by date of publication.

books.title: The Pilgrim Kamanita
books.author: Karl Gjellerup
books.summary: An Indian merchant’s son sets on a pilgrimage after a life of love, loss, business, and pleasure, and unknowingly relates his tale to the Buddha.

books.title: Three Men in a Boat
books.author: Jerome K. Jerome
books.summary: The humorous travelogue of a boating holiday down the Thames taken by three friends and their dog.
